features.name: multi-bit DFF with async reset
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit D flip-flop with asynchronous reset using posedge clk or negedge rstn sensitivity

features.name: dffunmap followed by write_smt2 -nobv
features.description: Code should include a synthesis sequence where dffunmap is called before write_smt2 with the -nobv option to trigger unsupported $dff cell type
features.snippet:
read_verilog top.v
prep
async2sync
dffunmap
write_smt2 -nobv

features.name: bit rotation via concatenation and slicing
features.description: Code should include a register rotation implemented using concatenation {p[1:0],p[2]} and bit-slicing double_gnt[5:3] | double_gnt[2:0]
